calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff William H. Burrell.
No appearance by defendant Taco, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on April 30, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 9, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed July 19, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff William H. Burrell, and against the Defaulted Defendant Taco, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - 0.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $18.87.
Costs - $214.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $233.37.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2010 Continued To Sep-03-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Continued To Jun-25-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
